title: Survival Enhanced
description: A much needed overhaul to the game! A must-have vanilla-plus modpack.
body: ## Description Making your game better using mods, datapacks and resource packs while still _**maintaining that Minecrafty feel**_ that keeps a lot of us on the game! This modpack contains my favourite mods and addons ranging from beautiful shaders, first person perspective to all new structures that make the game feel more lively. ## Features Included This modpack includes 84 projects, encompassing mods, datapacks, resource packs, and shaders. ### Mods and Datapacks Transform your Minecraft world with a curated selection of mods and datapacks designed to enhance gameplay while maintaining the familiar charm of the game. This collection brings together the best additions to elevate your adventures, from improved combat mechanics and immersive first-person perspectives to ambient sounds that make the game world more dynamic and engaging. ### Download the modpack and discover a richer, more vibrant Minecraft world while staying true to the essence of the game! ___
